title: Sent Invoice GET Schema
description: A schema for retrieving a sent invoice.

invoice.description: A reference to the booked invoice that was sent.

bookedInvoiceNumber.description: The number of the booked invoice.

self.description: The unique self reference of the booked invoice resource.

status.description: The status of the sent invoice.

sendBy.description: The e-invoicing channel through which this invoice was sent.

creationDate.description: The date that the invoice was sent.

createdBy.description: The e-conomic user that booked and sent the invoice.

name.description: The name of the recipient (if applicable).

mobilePhone.description: The phone number the invoice was sent to (if applicable).

ean.description: The EAN number the invoice was sent to (if applicable).

self.description: The unique self reference of the sent invoice resource.
